title: DeepGuard-XRay
description: Advanced Anti-Xray Protection with Machine Learning And Custom punishment
body:
# DeepGuard-XRay this plugin has been discontinued
### DeepGuard-X Ray is now open source
### Advanced Anti-Xray Protection with Machine Learning
Hey there! I'm excited to share the latest creation with you - DeepGuard-XRay v1.7.0 featuring our new Advanced Machine Learning System!

**Quick heads up:** This plugin is currently in Alpha state, so you might encounter some bugs. Your feedback would be incredibly valuable to help improve it!

## Why DeepGuard-XRay Exists
Let's be honest - running a Minecraft server and constantly fighting xray cheaters is exhausting. After trying all the popular anti-xray solutions out there, none of them really solved the problem without creating new ones.

## The Frustrations We All Face:
- ❌ Your TPS Tanks - Traditional solutions replace blocks server-wide, causing that annoying lag that drives players away
- ❌ Server Resources? Gone. - Why should your server suffer just to catch a few cheaters?
- ❌ Cheaters Still Get Through - Advanced clients and seed crackers make most solutions practically useless
- ❌ Your Staff Team is Burning Out - Constantly monitoring ore-mined alerts and teleporting to players just to watch them mine? No thanks.

## A Smarter Way to Catch Cheaters
**DeepGuard-XRay was built differently because your server deserves better:**

- ✅ Zero Packet Manipulation - No messing with game packets or modifying blocks. Legitimate players won't even know it's running
- ✅ Targeted Protection - Only affects detected cheaters, not everyone on your server
- ✅ Let Your Staff Actually Enjoy the Game - The system watches suspicious players 24/7 so your team can focus on what matters
- ✅ It Gets Smarter Every Day - The more it's used, the better it gets at catching cheaters through continuous training
- ✅ Your Server Performance? Protected. - Optimized to keep impact under 0.5% TPS
- ✅ Catches the Sneaky Ones - Detects patterns that other plugins miss completely

## How DeepGuard-XRay Works For You:
1. Smart Detection: The system observes mining patterns and flags suspicious behavior
1. Automated Monitoring: Once someone's flagged, it tracks their every move automatically
1. Evidence That Speaks For Itself: You get detailed reports showing exactly how they were cheating
1. Sneaky Countermeasures: Decoys and deterrents only deploy to suspected cheaters (it's quite satisfying watching them get confused!)
1. Always Learning: The system gets smarter with each detection - like having an anti-cheat that levels up
## "But Is It Really As Good As My Staff?"
Great question! While the system is incredibly effective, nothing beats the intuition of an experienced staff member... at first. The beauty of DeepGuard-XRay is that it's trainable:

- Not getting the accuracy you want? Feed it more training data
- Have specific cheating patterns on your server? Train it to recognize those exact patterns
- Want it to be as good as your best admin? Have that admin help train the system
- No ceiling on improvement - The more you train it, the better it gets - there's literally no limit to how accurate it can become
- Think of it as hiring a new staff member who needs some initial guidance but then works 24/7 without breaks, never complains, and gets better every single day.

Why waste time and server resources trying to catch xray cheaters the old way? Let DeepGuard-XRay do the heavy lifting while you focus on making your server awesome!

## What's Under The Hood
**Advanced Machine Learning System (NEW!)**
- Recognizes Different Mining Styles - Legitimate branch miners won't get falsely flagged
- Context Matters - Understands the difference between lucky mining and cheating
- Transparent Reasoning - Provides step-by-step explanations so you understand each detection
- Train It Your Way - Help it learn what normal mining looks like on your specific server
- Set It and Forget It - Automatically analyzes suspicious players while you sleep

## Key Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Advanced Machine Learning System (NEW!)**
- Smart Mining Style Recognition - Identifies different mining styles and adjusts analysis accordingly
- Context-Aware Analysis - Prevents false flags for legitimate branch miners
- Detailed Reasoning Process - Step-by-step explanations for each detection
- Training System - Collect data to improve detection accuracy
- Auto-Analysis - Automatically analyzes suspicious players
  
**Discord Integration**
- Real-time Discord Notifications for X-ray detection, suspicious mining, and staff actions
- Customizable Alert Types through easy-to-use GUI
- Detailed Embeds showing coordinates, players, and action details
- Staff Action Logging tracks which admin applied punishments or made changes
  
**Enhanced Staff Control Panel**
- Comprehensive ML Analysis Dashboard with suspicion indicators
- Training Data Management for normal players and cheaters
- Detailed Reports Panel for comprehensive detection information
- Auto-Analysis Configuration settings
- Interactive Elements with sound effects and visual feedback
  
**Intelligent Decoy System**
- Places strategic fake ores visible only to xray users
- Triggers instant staff alerts when mined
  
**Comprehensive Staff Tools**
- Real-time alerts with teleport links
- Visual highlight system for suspicious activities
- Detailed mining statistics dashboard
  
**Advanced Punishment System**
- 6-tier punishment system with escalating consequences
- Creative deterrents like fake diamonds, mining fatigue, and more
- Fully customizable through GUI or config files
  
**ParanoiaMode Features**
- Ghost Mobs: Hostile mobs that appear briefly and sometimes chase players before vanishing
- Whispering Voices: Chilling messages that suggest someone is watching the player
- Visual Hallucinations: Eerie particle effects like shadow figures, glowing eyes
- Fake Resources: Diamond ore illusions that disappear when approached
- Environmental Effects: Cave-ins, distant mining sounds, and camera shake effects
- Jump Scares: Fake damage effects and sudden mob appearances in peripheral vision

</details>



Admin Commands
/deepguard (alias: /dgx)

## Essential Commands

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- staff - Open the staff GUI menu
- teleport <x> <y> <z> - Teleport to coordinates
- togglealert - Toggle alert notifications
- highlight [radius|off] - Highlight nearby decoy ores
- points <add|remove|set|check> <player> [amount] - Manage suspicious points
- punish <set|remove|check> <player> [level] - Apply punishment levels
- ml <train|analyze|report|enable|disable|status> - ML-related commands
- update <check|auto|apply> - Update plugin
- commandhiding <enable|disable> - (Only usable by server OP)

### Main Permissions
- deepguardx.staff - Receive anti-xray alerts
- deepguardx.teleport - Teleport to suspicious locations
- deepguardx.togglealert - Allows to toggle the ore alert
- deepguardx.debug - Allows to Enable/Disable the debug alert
- deepguardx.gui - Access staff GUI menus
- deepguardx.highlight - Highlight decoy ore veins
- deepguardx.punish - Manage punishment levels
- deepguardx.modify - Allows access to the AntiXray Modify suspicious count
- deepguardx.ml - Access machine learning features
- deepguardx.autoupdate - Allows access to Use the update commands

### Machine Learning Permissions (NEW!)
- deepguardx.ml.train - Permission to train the ML system
- deepguardx.ml.analyze - Permission to analyze players with ML
- deepguardx.ml.report - Permission to view analysis reports
- deepguardx.ml.toggle - Permission to enable/disable the ML system
- deepguardx.ml.status - Permission to check ML system status

### GUI Access Permissions
- deepguardx.gui_playerstats - Player mining statistics
- deepguardx.gui_suspicious - Suspicious player data
- deepguardx.gui_punishment - Punishment settings
- deepguardx.gui_oreconfig - Allows access to oreconfig GUI
- deepguardx.gui_ml - Access to ML analysis GUI
- deepguardx.gui_config - Main configuration
- deepguardx.gui_mltoggle - Allows access to toggle the ML analysis feature
- deepguardx.gui_webhook - Configure Discord webhook settings
- deepguardx.gui_Appeal - Allows access to Appeal GUI

</details>



## Performance Impact
DeepGuard-XRay is designed with server performance as a priority:

- Minimal TPS Impact - Typically less than 0.5% server tick usage
- Configurable Resource Usage - Adjust settings based on your server needs
- Smart Processing - Only analyzes relevant player activities
- Optimized Data Collection - Throttled movement tracking for better performance

## Command Security
**Stealth Command Hiding (NEW in v1.7.7!)**

- Advanced command concealment system
- Toggle command visibility for unauthorized players
- Customizable "Unknown command" error messages
- Conditional permission-based access
- Prevents players from detecting the plugin's existence
  
## Command Hiding Mechanism


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Configuration Details
- Toggle command hiding on/off
- Configurable error messages
- Supports multiple command aliases
- Requires server restart to apply changes

## Permission Management
- deepguardx.use permission becomes critical when command hiding is enabled
- Default permission level: Operator (OP)
- Conditional access control

## Hidden Command Aliases
- /deepguard
- /dgx
- /deepguardx
- /deepguard-xray:deepguard
- /deepguard-xray:dgx

## Limitations

**Will still be visible in:**
- /pl (Plugins list)
- /help
- /about
- Tab completion

</details>


  

## Support & Feedback
As I continue to enhance DeepGuard-XRay, your feedback is invaluable! Please share:

Feature suggestions or improvements
Performance observations on your server
Detection effectiveness reports
Any bugs or unexpected behavior

## Best For
**Paper Servers**

- Bukkit and Spigot (not tested)
  
### Discord Support: Jasemi [this plugin has been discontinued]
- If you're looking for a custom plugin, message me on Discord!
